verdict: Thread wiring is deep where present (social §9.3-9.4b, mass battle §A.10, faction Domain Echo, NPC conviction), but the absences form ONE coherent P-14 hole: personal combat cannot host a thread op, articulation cannot render one, and the faction disposition engine cannot feel one. Verified directly: combat_engine_v1's 20 "thread" hits are all the verb "threads" (data-threading), zero threadwork; articulation_layer_v30 has 0 Thread/Coherence/Gap mentions; faction_behavior's α/β/γ/λ math takes none. P-14's real failure shape is (b) "a whole play mode is thread-impossible," not (a) co-movement omission — and combat is its sharpest case. Only Church exclusion (ED-679) is genuinely deliberate. MS/RS naming fork and ED-1010/1011 are hidden preconditions on the top wire-its, not fresh findings.
key_points: P-14 bar (canon 02 §P-14) = co-movement expressed in EVERY play mode; the live failure is mode-cannot-host-a-thread-op, not co-movement omission — no omission cases found.

WIRE-IT rank by North-Star value: 1 combat_engine_v1 (ED-911), 2 articulation render-path, 3 General Duel (child of 1), 4 faction_behavior engine math, 5 NPC Priority Trees (7/9 blind), 6 settlement governance verb, 7 Scene→Mass thread channel, 8 npc_memory P-09, 9 insurgency→Gap, 10 propagation-spec spine.
Verified combat_engine_v1 zero threadwork by direct read — all 'thread' tokens are function-data-threading, not Leap/Coherence; ED-911 confirmed, not rediscovered.

Verified articulation_layer_v30 has literally zero Thread/Coherence/Calamity/Gap/Rendering hits — the densest collision feed (thread→faction/settlement/NPC) computes but never surfaces; ED-681 authored 4 VG thread beats with no render path.
faction_behavior_v30 disposition engine (α/β/γ/λ, cosine cascade) takes only env.* shocks — no Coherence/Calamity term — a P-14 (b)-smell at the STRATEGIC layer's core mechanism.
Only 2 of 9 NPC faction Priority Trees (Varfell, Wardens) have any Thread-conditioned row; the asymmetry is arbitrary, not scaled to faction thread-exposure.
Settlement §3.2 governance verbs offer NO thread-response option though thread hits the settlement automatically (§4.4/§4.9) — passive state that should be a player choice.
DELIBERATELY ABSENT: Church thread-resistance (ED-679 cited intent) — do not wire, though the doctrine itself is stranded (Niflhel dissolved).
DEFER: sim/contest kernel thread hooks (staged, Stage 4 next) and territory_temperaments coupling (province-grain PROVISIONAL, mechanically inert corpus-wide).

MS/RS naming fork (ED-428/731/772, sweep never reached params/threadwork.md) plus ED-1010/1011 Coherence-cost contradictions are hidden PRECONDITIONS on wire-its #1/#4/#6/#10 — assessed, not re-reported as novel.
combat_v30 §10 (superseded) HAD Leap-in-combat that never migrated to combat_engine_v1 — the top gap is a regression, not an original absence.
scene.thread_operation Key exists in the substrate but its payload is [STUB]/unratified — thread is present-but-thin at the architecture layer, distinct from the true absences.

findings.claim: The personal-combat play mode cannot host a thread operation at all (verified: all 20 'thread' tokens in core/systems/wrapper.py are data-threading, zero Leap/Coherence), so P-14's 'expressed in every play mode' is vacuously unmet — the sharpest live P-14 (b)-shape failure; wire a mid-fight Leap/Coherence-commit hook.
findings.cite: designs/scene/combat_engine_v1/{core,systems,wrapper}.py (grep: no threadwork); combat_v30.md §10 superseded Leap-in-combat never migrated; ED-911

findings.claim: The sole narrative-surfacing layer has literally zero Thread/Coherence/Calamity/Gap/Rendering hits, so the corpus's densest collision feed (thread→faction/settlement/NPC per ED-673/675/676) computes but never reaches the player; ED-681 authored 4 thread narrative beats explicitly for the videogame with no consuming trigger.

The α/β/γ/λ disposition engine (cosine cascade, Mission/Legitimacy/PS) that gates every faction's signature action takes only env.* shocks — no Coherence/Calamity input (verified: 1 incidental thread mention, none in the math) — a P-14 inseparability smell at the strategic layer's core mechanism.

Only 2 of 9 faction Priority Trees (Varfell §8.5, Wardens §8.10) carry any Thread-conditioned row; Church/Crown/Hafenmark/Guilds/Löwenritter/RM have none, so institutional posture ignores Thread events in their own territory — arbitrary, not scaled to thread-exposure; wire a Thread-state row per tree.

Settlement governance §3.2 offers no verb to respond to Thread ops/exploitation at the governor's own location — thread affects the settlement automatically (§4.4/§4.9) but is never a player choice; a Regulate/Seal/Exploit-Thread-Site verb converts passive state into decision at the thinnest governance loop.

The Scene→Mass win-bonus table covers Social/Investigation/Combat wins only, with no Thread-scene channel, despite thread being the densest personal-scale action (§A.10) — the one action with no cross-scale up-transition.

The flagship cross-scale-consequence spine (propagation_spec_v1, holonic_container_doctrine) never names threadwork or Coherence, so the transform that should route thread state up/down the scale ladder omits it; also scene.thread_operation's Key payload is [STUB], leaving thread present-but-thin at the substrate.

The live MS(threadwork_v30 §5)/RS(params/threadwork.md) naming fork and the ED-1010/1011 per-op Coherence-cost contradictions are hidden preconditions on the top wire-its: Leap-in-combat cannot be cost-specified while §3.7 and mass §A.10 disagree, and a Godot Resource field cannot bind a two-named track — assessed as a gating dependency, not a novel find.
findings.cite: threadwork_v30.md §5 vs params/threadwork.md L136-138; canon/editorial_ledger.jsonl ED-428/731/772; grounding 03 §5 ED-1010/1011
